name: Cave Bridge — North End
description: You stand at the north end of a narrow stone bridge that spans a deep chasm. The bridge is slick with moisture. Faint torchlight flickers somewhere to the south.
ambient: The chasm below is pitch black. You hear nothing but the slow drip of water.
A draft carries the scent of old decay.
The bridge stones feel loose underfoot.

interaction_rules.text: You toss a small stone over the edge. Seconds pass. No sound returns.
The stone is cold and slick with condensation. Your hand comes away smelling of wet limestone.
